Description.description: Empower your team to efficiently manage and resolve technical support cases with TSANET, designed to streamline case tracking and enhance collaboration.

Dependent.displayName: On Create TSA Note - Add Case Post
On Update Email - Create TSA Note
On Create Note - Create TSA Note

On Create TSA Case - Auto Route
